title: Product Launch Playbook
subtitle: A structured guide to shipping your next feature

compositionDecision.rationale: Template fixture exercises all section renderers in a linear article layout.
dataShape: process, pros-cons, stat-grid, risk-matrix, checklist sections

alternatives.reason: Readiness metrics and launch checklist could support a dashboard.

summary: Launching a product feature requires coordinating engineering, marketing, and support across six clear stages. The pros and cons of an aggressive vs cautious approach, key readiness metrics, risk factors, and a launch-day checklist.

sections.title: Product Launch Playbook
sections.emphasis: Launching a product feature requires coordinating engineering, marketing, and support across six clear stages.

items.text: Launching a product feature requires coordinating engineering, marketing, and support across six clear stages.

items.label: Ideation
items.text: Define the problem, target users, and success metrics.

items.label: Development
items.text: Build the feature with test coverage and feature flags.

items.label: Internal Review
items.text: Dogfood the feature with the team and collect feedback.

items.label: Beta
items.text: Release to a 10% cohort and monitor usage metrics.

items.label: Marketing
items.text: Prepare docs, changelog, and announcement materials.

items.label: Ship
items.text: Gradual roll-out with monitoring dashboards and a rollback plan.

items.label: Pro
items.text: Faster user feedback and earlier revenue recognition.

items.label: Pro
items.text: Builds momentum and internal motivation.

items.label: Con
items.text: Higher risk of public-facing bugs and user churn.

items.label: Con
items.text: Less time for documentation and support preparation.
Test coverage target
P0 bugs at ship time
Support response SLA
Beta cohort cycles
Docs completeness

items.label: Critical
items.text: Data migration bug causes data loss.

items.label: Warning
items.text: UI regression in legacy browser.
items.detail: Mitigation: automated visual diff in CI.

items.label: Minor
items.text: Copy error in settings page.
items.detail: Mitigation: doc string review in PR template.

items.label: Notice
items.text: Slight perf regression on large accounts.
items.detail: Mitigation: benchmark gate in CI pipeline.

items.text: Feature flag turned on for internal team
items.label: done

items.text: Monitoring dashboards reviewed and green
items.label: done

items.text: Changelog published and announcement queued
Support team briefed on known issues
Rollback procedure verified
Post-launch review meeting scheduled
